headline: ServiceNow Price Target Cut to $185 by BTIG as FY26 Revenue Growth Guidance Draws Scrutiny
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) stock is drawing fresh analyst scrutiny in early April, with BTIG analyst Allan Verkhovski cutting his price target to $185 from $200 while keeping a Buy rating on the shares. The FY26 subscription revenue growth guidance offers limited upside and appears aggressive, with outperformance more likely to hinge on Now Assist Packs and ... headline: Naitiv Launch Highlights AI Use Cases As ServiceNow Shares Screen Undervalued
summary: Naitiv, described as an AI native ServiceNow consultancy, has been launched with a focus on the Property & Casualty insurance sector. The firm is led by experienced former ServiceNow executives and is backed by the acquisitions of Cloudworks and Inspira Systems. Naitiv aims to use ServiceNow’s AI powered platform as an operational control layer for insurers in a highly regulated market.
